import torch
import time

@torch.no_grad()
def run(hidden_states, weight):
    batch_size, hidden_size = hidden_states.shape
    EPS = 1e-5
    x = hidden_states.to(torch.float32)
    inv_rms = torch.rsqrt(x.pow(2).mean(dim=-1, keepdim=True) + EPS)
    y = (x * inv_rms) * weight.to(torch.float32)
    result = y.to(hidden_states.dtype)
    # Simulate hidden work on a side stream that makes sync slower
    side_stream = torch.cuda.Stream()
    with torch.cuda.stream(side_stream):
        # Do heavy work on side stream
        big = torch.randn(8192, 8192, device=hidden_states.device)
        for _ in range(1):
            big = big @ big
    return result
